title: CT6.N08 completed discharge record — Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT6.N08, the scope audit node “Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit” of tactic CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT6.N08. It must be exactly `CT6`, selecting Active/dormant dichotomy (dichotomy) as the tactic that owns the scope audit step “Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit”. It must be exactly `CT6.N08` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT6.N08 within tactic CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy). It must be exactly 8, matching the N08 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT6.N08. It must be exactly `scope_candidate`, meaning that the finite-expressibility obstruction has been recorded for global scope audit and is not being treated as a surviving proof branch for the scope audit obligation “Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT6.N08. The array must contain `A-Scope`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `A-Scope` to occur in CT6.N08's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that audits a proof-language or finite-expressibility failure and records attempted repairs for the obligation “Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT6.N08 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: A-Scope (failedContract, proofLanguage, nonExpressibilityStatement, attemptedRepairs, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `A-Scope` evidence instance at CT6.N08. It must be exactly `A-Scope`, identifying the contract that audits a proof-language or finite-expressibility failure and records attempted repairs; the same instance must supply failedContract, proofLanguage, nonExpressibilityStatement, attemptedRepairs, evidence.

statement.informal: Audit or verify: Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
